name: wsl-setup
description: Set up and troubleshoot WSL2 as a first-class development and service-hosting environment - install a distro, choose the right networking mode (NAT + localhostForwarding vs mirrored + dnsTunneling), keep the distro alive for hosted services, and diagnose corp-network egress and host<->WSL loopback failures. Composes with agent-worktrees' agent-worktrees-wsl-provision (repo cloning + Windows Terminal profiles). Ships the setting-up-wsl and troubleshooting-wsl-networking skills
